name: NPR One API
description: The NPR One API provides access to personalized NPR audio content. It powers the NPR One listening experience, offering recommendations, search, user identity management, station finding, and ratings/history tracking. The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication and returns Collection.Doc+JSON responses.
